## Discussion

The usage combines with the page to determine specific functionality. This may not be specified, in which case the `HIDUsage` refers to the overall page.

# usage

**Instance Property**

The usage value.

## Declaration

```swift
var usage: UInt16? { get }
```

## Discussion

The usage combines with the page to determine specific functionality. This may not be specified, in which case the `HIDUsage` refers to the overall page.
title: usage
